title: Accessing Shared Network Drives and File Shares
text:
Q: How do I access shared network drives and file shares?
A: To access shared network drives and file shares, first ensure you are connected to the company network either on-site or via VPN if working remotely. On a Windows machine, open File Explorer and select 'This PC' from the left-hand menu. Click on 'Map network drive' in the toolbar, choose a drive letter, and enter the path to the shared drive (e.g., \\server\share). If prompted, enter your network credentials. On a Mac, open Finder, click 'Go' in the menu bar, and select 'Connect to Server.' Enter the server address and click 'Connect,' then provide your credentials if required. If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT helpdesk for further assistance.
